title: ANGRAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 06 Young Professional I Posts
description: Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has officially released the notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 06 Young Professional I Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their B.Sc, M.Sc can use this chance and apply for the ANGRAU Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
